title: Finalists Announced for the 3rd International Digital Film Festival Istanbul
content:
Student

News

Details

Finalists Announced for the 3rd International Digital Film Festival Istanbul

The

will be held for the

third time

between

October 18–21, 2025

, across various venues in Istanbul. Featuring short film screenings, panels, talks, workshops, and a gala ceremony, the festival will focus on the

digital transformation of the film industry

.

Finalist Films

Fiction:

Across the Waters

(France),

Claimant

(Iran),

Garan Tr

(Türkiye)

Documentary:

Sezenler Olsun

(Türkiye),

Zurvan

(Iran),

Middle of the Way

(Türkiye)

Experimental:

Lost in the Woods

(USA),

I You He/She We You They

(Türkiye),

I Feel Like a Piece of Meat

(Türkiye)

Animation:

Volcelest

(France),

Blue Dove and the Pomegranate Tree

(USA),

Milo

(Türkiye)

AI-Supported:

Memory Maker

(USA),

Finish and Paranoid Dream

(Argentina),

The Soviet Phoenix

(Germany)

Video Art:

You Will Always Be Welcome Here

(Italy),

Nor Any Memories of the Turning Backs

(Türkiye),

Let It Grow

(China)

Fashion Film:

Echo Bloom

(Japan),

MX.

(UK),

No-Land: No-Landers

(UK)

Pre-Jury

Finalists were selected by

Serkan Yıldız

(DFA Coordinator),

(Director),

Dr. Lecturer Seda Aktaş

(Academic), and

Gürkan Yücel

(Director).

Theme 2025

This year’s festival theme is

“A New Era, A New Narrative: Cinema with Generative Artificial Intelligence.”

The theme explores the transformative role of AI in creative processes such as screenwriting, editing, visual design, and music.

Main Jury and Awards

The

Main Jury Chair

is

Özcan Alper

. Other jury members include:

Bennu Yıldırımlar

(Actress)

Natali Yeres

(Art Director)

Prof. Dr. Hülya Önal

(Academic)

Sadi Çilingir

(Film Critic)

(Academic)

(Digital Artist)

The festival, organized under the coordination of

, is partnered with

Doğuş University

, which will provide

100% and 75% master’s degree scholarships

to the winning films.

Events will be hosted by

Crea Center Çekmeköy

, with the support of

and

. The winning films will be announced at the

gala ceremony on October 21, 2025

, at the

.

Awards will be presented in categories including

Directing, Screenwriting, Editing, Cinematography, Acting, Sound–Music, and Art Direction

, as well as the

UN Sustainable Development Goals Award

and the

DFA Special Award

.
